reviewer: agent matrix pass (headless Chrome, real download+run, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — revision 2

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — REAL WASM run: fresh profile → Download (~95 MB) → auto-init → ready, then Xenova/grammar-synthesis-small corrected input in a Web Worker with a streamed TextStreamer; 0 console errors. Verify sample 'i has went to the store yesterday and buyed three apple' → 'I have gone to the store and bought three apple trees.' conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ 0✗ 0▨ 0◍ — loads-clean=pass, calls-real-inference=pass. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/mobile.png

Agent verdict — real greedy decode produced a transformed, grammatical output appropriate to the input: 'she dont has no time for to finish the report' → 'she has no time to finish the report.' with a word-level diff reporting 4 edits (1 added, 3 removed). Output is a genuine correction of the input, streamed token-by-token, not fake. conformance: 0✓ 0✗ 0▨ 1◍ — io-shape-semantic=manual. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/desktop.png
rubric.notes: Agent-verified: correction + diff match the input.

rubric.evidence: conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 5✓ 0✗ 0▨ 0◍ — declares-model-id=pass (Xenova/grammar-synthesis-small linked to card + pszemraj original), declares-task=pass (text2text-generation), declares-backend=pass (WASM), declares-quantisation=pass (q8), inference-off-main-thread=pass (new Worker). screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/desktop.png

Agent verdict — fresh profile shows 'Download model (~95 MB)'; after load the shared createModelLoader auto-inits to 'Model ready' with a 'Clear cached model' control + storage detail. Encoder + merged decoder ONNX fetched THROUGH Cache Storage so a returning visit is scannable → auto-init, no re-download. conformance: 1✓ 0✗ 0▨ 1◍ — shared-auto-init-loader=pass, auto-init-on-cached=manual. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/desktop.png

Agent verdict — download progress streamed on the loader; a Retry button surfaces on failure; correction failures route to .status.err text the visitor can read; runs on the WASM path (no GPU) and produced real output, so it degrades to nothing — it just works without WebGPU. conformance: 2✓ 0✗ 0▨ 2◍ — live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass, honest-progress-retry-offline=manual, runs-without-webgpu-fallback=manual. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/mobile.png

Agent verdict — the text area, 5 preset buttons, Correct, and Clear are all real, labelled, and keyboard-operable; presets fill the box, Clear empties + focuses it. On the practical page: Proofread + Copy corrected (clipboard). No dead controls. conformance: 0✓ 0✗ 0▨ 1◍ — controls-operable=manual. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/mobile.png

Agent verdict — the corrected text and the word-level diff are both derived from the on-device worker's real generated output (verified: distinct corrections for distinct inputs, streamed live). No canned result. conformance: 0✓ 0✗ 0▨ 1◍ — no-fake-output=manual. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/desktop.png

conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ 0✗ 0▨ 0◍ — images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass. Diff spans carry aria-label 'added:'/'removed:'; the decode-timeline canvas has an aria-label; status/output are role=status aria-live. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/desktop.png
rubric.notes: Diff changes announced to SR; labelled canvas.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — desktop 1280×800 (light+dark) and mobile 360×740 DPR3 reviewed: no horizontal overflow (measured documentElement.scrollWidth−innerWidth = 0px at mobile), legible text, the at-a-glance table wraps, preset-grid + controls-grid use auto-fit minmax so they collapse on mobile. conformance: 2✓ 0✗ 0▨ 1◍ — responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass, parity-both-classes=manual. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/desktop-dark.png, reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/mobile.png
rubric.notes: Agent-verified: 0px mobile overflow, light+dark both clean.

rubric.evidence: Agent verdict — all generation runs in a Web Worker with a TextStreamer, so tokens stream without blocking the main thread; the word-level diff is an O(n·m) LCS over short word arrays, cheap. Main thread stayed responsive during load + decode. conformance: 0✓ 0✗ 0▨ 1◍ — inp-stays-low=manual. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/grammar-correction/desktop.png

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Break up long main-thread tasks / yield so inference doesn't spike INP.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — all seq2seq generation runs off the main thread in a Web Worker; tokens are streamed back incrementally.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: conformance inference-off-main-thread=pass; worker.js runs pipe() with a TextStreamer

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep heavy JS off the interaction path to keep INP low.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — clicking Correct posts to the worker; the only main-thread work is a small LCS diff over short word arrays.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless: main-thread responsive during decode; 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label every control; announce state + dynamic content in a live region.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live loader + output; diff insert/delete spans carry aria-label 'added:'/'removed:'; labelled buttons/textarea; timeline canvas has aria-label.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid layout; avoid fixed widths; wrap wide content so the body never scrolls horizontally.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — preset-grid, controls-grid, stat-row all use auto-fit minmax; grid-2 (multi-model) collapses on mobile; at-a-glance table wraps.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.

openQuestions: On very long inputs the small model can drop a clause or lightly paraphrase — should the practical page warn when the output length diverges sharply from the input?
Would a larger checkpoint (grammar-synthesis-base) be worth adding as a separate quality/size demo? (Additive, not a replacement.)

followUpGoals.goal: Add a text-to-speech third stage to the multi-model page (ASR → grammar → TTS) so the cleaned transcript can be read back — additive enhancement.
Add a WebGPU execution-provider fast path for grammar-correction (honest WASM fallback retained) as an additive enhancement.

summary: Revision-2 agent matrix pass for grammar-correction: real download + on-device seq2seq run verified in headless Chrome (distinct real corrections with a word-level diff, streamed token-by-token), light+dark and mobile+desktop screenshots reviewed (0px overflow, legible, operable controls), console clean. Expectations set honestly for the small (~77M) checkpoint. Auto-checkable conformance assertions pass (14/14 tested); manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdict above.
